contexts: The amygdala processes emotions especially fear and threat detection.
The reticular activating system controls wakefulness and attention levels.
The corpus callosum connects the two hemispheres of the brain.
Sparse distributed representations are efficient encodings used by the brain.
Broca area is essential for speech production and language processing.
Wernicke area is critical for language comprehension and understanding.
